nodes.label: Adapter Resolver Chain (override -> Expo module -> bare peer -> memory)
nodes.norm_label: adapter resolver chain (override -> expo module -> bare peer -> memory)

nodes.label: Native Modules to Peer Dependencies Shift
nodes.norm_label: native modules to peer dependencies shift

nodes.label: Six-Step Workflow (Constitution -> Specify -> Clarify -> Plan -> Tasks -> Implement)
nodes.norm_label: six-step workflow (constitution -> specify -> clarify -> plan -> tasks -> implement)

nodes.label: ClassificationRule Interface
nodes.rationale: Introduced to make ErrorClassifier extensible; custom rules take precedence over defaults allowing app-specific error classification without forking the library

nodes.label: Result<T,E> Pattern
nodes.rationale: Rust-inspired type to eliminate try/catch for predictable error paths; Ok<T> and Err<E> classes with map, flatMap, unwrap, unwrapOr, mapErr methods

nodes.label: useResponsive (Configurable Breakpoints)
nodes.rationale: Hardcoded breakpoints (360/768/1024) prevented apps with different design systems from using the hook without forking; optional param + ConfigContext merge allows customization while preserving backward compatibility

nodes.label: useSafeCall isMounted Guard
nodes.rationale: Missing isMounted guard caused React warnings and memory leaks when state updates fired after component unmount during async operations

nodes.label: useFormState handleSubmit Memoization
nodes.rationale: handleSubmit created a new function reference on every render causing unnecessary re-renders of memoized child components; wrapping in useCallback provides referential stability

nodes.label: SecureStorage Init Guard (readyPromise)
nodes.rationale: Constructor called loadKeys() async without awaiting it; early get() calls returned null for existing keys causing data loss risk; readyPromise pattern ensures init completes before any operation

nodes.label: CoreProvider Singleton Safety
nodes.rationale: CoreProvider cleanup called dispose() on singleton managers breaking other consumers; fix removes dispose() calls and only removes provider-owned listeners on unmount

nodes.label: ThemeShadowValue (React Native Shadow Objects)
nodes.rationale: CSS shadow strings never worked on React Native (the target platform); breaking change justified to fix completely non-functional shadows; new type uses shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/elevation

nodes.label: ThemeManager Idempotent Listener
nodes.rationale: setupAppearanceListener() called in both constructor and init() created duplicate system appearance listeners causing double re-renders and wasted resources

nodes.label: ThemeManager Logger Integration
nodes.rationale: Direct console.warn bypasses Logger production mode suppression; using Logger ensures consistent behavior and no output leakage in production builds

nodes.label: LogFormatter Numeric Level to String Fix
nodes.rationale: LogLevel is a numeric enum (INFO=1); JSON.stringify serialized it as 1 but tests expected 'INFO' string; fixed by converting numeric level to string name in JsonFormatter
nodes.norm_label: logformatter numeric level to string fix

nodes.label: Locale Formatting Flexible Matchers Fix
nodes.rationale: Node.js limited ICU produces different whitespace/symbols than full ICU; hardcoded test expectations broke in CI; fix uses flexible matchers (regex/toContain) instead of exact string matches

nodes.label: React 19 Concurrent Mode ErrorBoundary Fix
nodes.rationale: React 19 concurrent mode retries components; throw-once pattern discarded on retry; fix uses makeAlwaysThrowingComponent to ensure all retries fail so boundary activates

nodes.label: eslint-plugin-react-hooks Installation
nodes.rationale: Missing plugin caused react-hooks/exhaustive-deps rule to be silently disabled; hook dependency linting was inactive for all hooks

nodes.label: any Type Replacements in src/
nodes.rationale: ~60 any types in published src/ code reduced type safety and IDE autocomplete for consumers; replaced with unknown, proper generics, or inline disable with justification comments

nodes.label: Infrastructure Layer (Architecture)
nodes.rationale: All infrastructure services use Singleton pattern so a single shared instance is accessible anywhere in the app via getInstance()

nodes.label: OptiCore React Native Library
nodes.rationale: Pure infrastructure library wiring Axios, Zustand, AsyncStorage together with auth token injection, error classification, pluggable log transports, and offline queue — value proposition over using individual libraries directly

nodes.label: SecureStore Web Platform Limitation
nodes.rationale: SecureStore relies on iOS Keychain and Android Keystore; no web equivalent exists — consumers must fall back to storage.local on web

nodes.label: Result<T,E> vs Try-Catch
nodes.rationale: Result<T,E> makes errors part of the return type so callers are forced to handle them; eliminates silent swallowing that occurs with unguarded try-catch

nodes.label: Async Form Validation via Zod refine
nodes.norm_label: async form validation via zod refine

nodes.label: Migration from Plain Axios to ApiClient
nodes.norm_label: migration from plain axios to apiclient

nodes.label: Migration from Direct AsyncStorage to StorageManager
nodes.norm_label: migration from direct asyncstorage to storagemanager

nodes.label: Optimistic UI Pattern with Offline Queue
nodes.norm_label: optimistic ui pattern with offline queue

nodes.label: OptiCoreProvider Root Setup
nodes.rationale: OptiCoreProvider replaces manual coreSetup.init() by handling initialization, React Query setup, theme wiring, and cleanup on unmount in a single wrapper component
